task_completion.description: Verify JavaScript rendering is enabled in Screaming Frog SEO Spider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Screaming Frog Spider Configuration window (Rendering tab), the rendering mode dropdown should be set to 'JavaScript'.

task_completion.description: Verify the viewport size is set to the specified mobile dimensions (375x812).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Screaming Frog Spider Configuration window (Rendering tab), the Window Size should be explicitly set to 375 (width) and 812 (height).

task_completion.description: Verify page screenshots capture is enabled in the configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Screaming Frog Spider Configuration window (Rendering tab), the 'Page Screenshots' checkbox must be ticked.

task_completion.description: Verify the 5 specific target URLs were successfully crawled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Screaming Frog interface should list the 5 target books.toscrape.com URLs (home, travel_2, mystery_3, historical-fiction_4, science_22) in the results pane, ideally showing a 200 OK status.

task_completion.description: Verify the screenshots were bulk exported to the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing image files (.png/.jpg) successfully saved in the '~/Documents/SEO/exports/mobile_screenshots/' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually used the Screaming Frog SEO Spider GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Screaming Frog application interface must be visible in the trajectory screenshots, showing the configuration and crawl process.

integrity.description: Verify the exported images are genuine mobile viewport renders.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported screenshots (or previews in Screaming Frog) should show a narrow, mobile-optimized layout of the Books to Scrape website (375px wide), not a cropped desktop layout.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually take OS-level screenshots of a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported screenshot files should only contain the webpage content. They must not include OS UI elements like browser address bars, tabs, or system docks.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The 5 target URLs are: https://books.toscrape.com/, https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/travel_2/index.html, https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/mystery_3/index.html, https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/historical-fiction_4/index.html, and https://books.toscrape.com/catalogue/category/books/science_22/index.html. The required viewport dimensions are exactly 375x812 pixels (iPhone X dimensions). The expected image width of the resulting screenshots is 375 pixels.
